name: Pizza Dough#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water.
2. Stir in sugar, salt, olive or vegetable oil, and 1 and 3/4 cups of the all-purpose flour.
3. Turn the mixture onto a well-floured board and knead until smooth and elastic. This should take about five minutes.
4. Continue kneading with enough of the remaining flour to prevent sticking.
